nasb.text: There is a kind of man whose teeth are like swords And his jaw teeth like knives, To devour the afflicted from the earth And the needy from among men.

esv.text: There are those whose teeth are swords, whose fangs are knives, to devour the poor from off the earth, the needy from among mankind.

cnv.text: 有一種人牙如劍， 齒如刀， 要吞滅地上的困苦人 和世人中的貧窮人。

ccb.text: 有一种人牙如剑， 齿如刀， 要吞吃世间的困苦人和贫穷人。

csbs.text: 这世代的牙齿如剑，尖牙如刀， 要吞噬地上的困苦人和世人中的贫穷人。
